history.qwen_observation: SpringFox dependencies and annotations are incompatible with Spring Boot 3.x, causing 'package io.swagger.annotations does not exist' after the SB upgrade.
history.qwen_rationale: Migrating SpringFox to SpringDoc before upgrading Spring Boot replaces the abandoned springfox dependencies with springdoc-openapi, resolving the missing package errors and allowing the SB 3.3 upgrade to proceed cleanly.

history.qwen_observation: The explicit SpringFoxToSpringDoc step broke the build by removing io.swagger:swagger-annotations while the OpenAPI generator still produced code referencing it, causing compilation failures.
history.qwen_rationale: Dropping the explicit SpringFoxToSpringDoc step and relying on the UpgradeSpringBoot_3_3 meta-recipe, which handles framework migrations more holistically. The chain then proceeds with standard Java 21 plugin/build upgrades and source transforms.

history.qwen_observation: Build fails during Spring Boot 3.3 upgrade due to missing io.swagger.annotations package in OpenAPI-generated code and a ClassAlreadyExistsException in jsonschema2pojo, likely caused by SpringFox removal and outdated generator plugin versions.
history.qwen_rationale: Insert the library-mandated SpringFoxToSpringDoc step before the SB-3 upgrade. Add a POM_PATCH step to explicitly provide io.swagger:swagger-annotations (removed transitively by SpringFox removal) and force-upgrade jsonschema2pojo-maven-plugin to 1.2.1 to resolve the ClassAlreadyExistsException bug. This prepares the build environment before the SB-3 meta-recipe runs.

history.qwen_observation: The build fails during the SpringFox-to-SpringDoc migration step because the jsonschema2pojo plugin throws ClassAlreadyExistsException and generated sources cannot resolve io.swagger.annotations after dependency changes.
history.qwen_rationale: Placing a POM patch step before the migration ensures the code generator plugin is upgraded to a stable version (1.2.1) and explicitly provides the io.swagger:swagger-annotations dependency on the classpath, preventing both the generation collision and the missing-package compile error when the recipe modifies the POM.

history.qwen_observation: SpringFoxToSpringDoc recipe removed io.swagger:swagger-annotations dependency, causing generated code to fail compilation, and triggered jsonschema2pojo ClassAlreadyExistsException due to plugin version incompatibility.
history.qwen_rationale: Placing a pom_patch step after SpringFoxToSpringDoc restores the missing swagger-annotations dependency required by generated sources and upgrades jsonschema2pojo-maven-plugin to 1.2.3 to resolve the ClassAlreadyExistsException collision. The chain then proceeds with the SB 3.3 upgrade and Java 21 migration steps.
